User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the KRA Dashboard application. This entity is crucial for linking all KRA-related data to a specific individual, ensuring data consistency across devices based on their login email.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The unique email address of the user, used for login and associating all their KRA data.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user's information was updated.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Logs all significant activities within the organization for the real-time activity feed on the dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry.

actorName.description: The name of the person who performed the action.

employeeName.description: The name of the employee affected by the action.

action.description: A concise summary of the action performed (e.g., 'Leave Request: Approved').

type.description: The category of the activity for icon mapping.

KeyResultArea.title: KeyResultArea
KeyResultArea.description: Defines a Key Result Area (KRA) within the organization.

id.description: Unique identifier for the KeyResultArea entity.

name.description: A concise, descriptive name for the KRA.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the KRA's objective and scope.

isActive.description: Indicates whether this KRA definition is currently active.

definition.description: Stores global activity logs for the dashboard feed.
Stores organizational KRA records assigned to employees.
Determines administrative roles by document existence.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure uses a flat collection approach for activities to enable organization-wide real-time feeds while maintaining user-specific data under existing patterns. Security rules are configured to allow cross-user visibility for the activity feed while keeping sensitive profile data protected.
